candidate_llm_application: KOGI-MAMA-COUNCIL — multi-agent long-horizon forecast council. N=5 specialist elder LLM agents A_1..A_5 each fine-tuned on a distinct hazard category (climate, biosecurity, financial-cascade, infrastructure, geopolitical). Council convenes on structured prompt; each Mama outputs (forecast_i, confidence_i, hazard-class probability vector). Aggregation = weighted average with weights = per-elder validation calibration. FLAG-VETO override: if any elder's hazard-class p_critical > τ_warn, override aggregate with structured warning + all rationales. Optional multi-pass contemplative deliberation (read peers' outputs, revise).
rule: hit iff kw_count>=2 OR sem_score>=0.7 OR func_score>=0.7; total_hits>=1 => FAIL

results.title: Council Mode 2604.02923 — heterogeneous multi-agent council + dedicated consensus model + structured synthesis
results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN on the council-aggregation mechanism. Council Mode 2604.02923 IS the heterogeneous multi-agent council + dedicated consensus model + structured synthesis paradigm — directly the KOGI-MAMA-COUNCIL aggregation backbone. N specialist elder LLM agents = Council Mode's heterogeneous LLM members; weighted-consensus aggregation = Council Mode's dedicated consensus model + structured synthesis. The candidate's per-hazard specialization is a labeling choice over an already heterogeneous council. Functional-twin AND semantic-twin on council+consensus+structured-synthesis. Keyword overlap on 'long-horizon multi-elder hazard council' framing (kw_count=1).

results.title: Multi-Agent Debate Stability OpenReview Vusd1Hw2D9 — iterative refinement + KS-test stability detection
results.rationale: Multi-Agent Debate Stability Vusd1Hw2D9 supplies the iterative-refinement + agents-read-peers-and-revise mechanism — directly the candidate's 'Aluna-style multi-pass contemplative deliberation' (each elder reads peers' outputs and revises). KS-test stability detection is the more sophisticated convergence criterion the candidate's deliberation loop lacks. Functional-twin on the multi-pass-debate-with-peer-revision substrate; semantic-twin on the iterative-multi-agent-refinement framing. Keyword overlap on 'Aluna-inspired contemplative deliberation' (kw_count=1).

results.title: LLM Council Karpathy — lightweight multi-LLM council querying interface
results.rationale: LLM Council Karpathy IS the lightweight multi-LLM council + consensus aggregation pattern — directly the candidate's N=5 elder council querying skeleton. The candidate's per-hazard specialization is a downstream fine-tune of council members; the council interface, parallel querying, and aggregation are Karpathy's pattern unchanged. The candidate's own novelty claim concedes 'LLM Council Karpathy covers multi-agent forecast council.' Functional-twin on the multi-LLM-parallel-query + consensus substrate; semantic-twin on the LLM-council framing.

results.title: VirtusLab LLM Council — open-source council consensus
results.rationale: VirtusLab LLM Council is the open-source implementation of multi-LLM council consensus — concretely supplies the council-of-LLMs + consensus-aggregation production pattern the candidate composes from. The candidate's per-hazard elder labeling + flag-veto are additions to the VirtusLab base council; the underlying council mechanism is the same. Functional-twin on the open-source-council-implementation substrate; semantic-twin on the LLM-council framing.

results.title: Council AI 2026 — 27+ frontier models multi-LLM platform
results.rationale: Council AI app IS the production-grade multi-model council platform — N=27+ frontier models from 8 providers in a council collaboration substrate. The candidate's N=5 specialist elders is a small-N specialization of Council AI's existing council platform. Functional-twin on the deployed-multi-model-council substrate; semantic-twin on the council-platform framing. Keyword overlap on 'long-horizon multi-elder hazard council' framing.

results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN on the weighted-consensus + specialist-role-separation contribution. The Democratic Voting-Based Council Medium piece IS the weighted-voting + specialist-role-separation paradigm — directly the candidate's (3) weighted-consensus aggregation + (1) per-hazard specialist elder pair. Weighted voting = candidate's weights-via-calibration aggregation; specialist-role-separation = candidate's per-hazard fine-tuning. Keyword overlap on 'per-hazard-specialist elder agent forecast' and 'weighted-consensus with flag-veto aggregation' (kw_count=2). Functional-twin AND semantic-twin on the weighted-voting + role-specialist council substrate. The candidate's flag-veto is a thin extension of weighted-voting with a confidence threshold.

results.rationale: Courtroom-Style Multi-Agent Debate 2603.28488 supplies the role-switching + structured-multi-agent-deliberation substrate — directly the candidate's per-hazard-role-elder + multi-pass deliberation. Functional-twin on the role-specialist-debate substrate; semantic-twin on the multi-agent-debate-with-roles framing. The flag-veto in candidate is a structured-warning override; courtroom-style debate's verdict mechanism is a closely-analogous decision aggregator.

The candidate's flag-veto override is a threshold-triggered fallback already documented in safety-aware variants the survey covers.

reason: 8 of 8 results trigger hit under sem>=0.7 AND func>=0.7; 2 additionally trigger kw>=2. The candidate decomposes exhaustively across four prior-art clusters: (cluster A — heterogeneous multi-agent council + consensus aggregation) Council Mode 2604.02923 (sem 0.92, func 0.92) IS the heterogeneous-council + dedicated-consensus-model + structured-synthesis verbatim; LLM Council Karpathy (sem 0.84, func 0.82) IS the lightweight multi-LLM council; VirtusLab LLM Council (sem 0.82, func 0.78) IS the open-source consensus implementation; Council AI app (sem 0.80, func 0.76) IS the production multi-model platform. (cluster B — weighted-voting + specialist-role-separation) Democratic Voting-Based Council Medium (kw=2, sem 0.78, func 0.74) IS the weighted-voting + specialist-role council paradigm — directly the candidate's per-hazard-specialist + weighted-consensus contribution. (cluster C — multi-agent debate with iterative refinement + role-switching) Multi-Agent Debate Stability Vusd1Hw2D9 (sem 0.88, func 0.86) supplies the iterative-multi-pass-revision mechanism — directly the candidate's 'Aluna-style contemplative deliberation'; Courtroom-Style Multi-Agent Debate 2603.28488 (sem 0.86, func 0.84) supplies role-switching + structured-deliberation. (cluster D — collective-intelligence consensus aggregation survey) Multi-Agent LLM Collective Intelligence Survey 202511.1370 (kw=2, sem 0.76, func 0.72) catalogs the weighted-average / majority-voting consensus space the candidate's aggregation directly instantiates. The three claimed contributions — (a) per-hazard specialist elders, (b) flag-veto override on critical-hazard probability, (c) Aluna-style contemplative multi-pass deliberation — are anticipated cluster-by-cluster: (a) by Democratic Voting-Based Council's specialist-role separation + Courtroom-Style Debate's role-switching; (b) by the safety-threshold variants documented in Collective Intelligence Survey + Council Mode's consensus-model arbitration; (c) by Multi-Agent Debate Stability's iterative-peer-revision and Courtroom-Style's progressive multi-round deliberation. The Kogi/Arhuaco/Wiwa/Kankuamo + Aluna + Sierra Nevada cultural framing supplies only narrative for the multi-agent council + weighted-consensus + iterative-deliberation design; the underlying mechanism is fully covered. The candidate's own novelty claim already concedes 'LLM Council + Collective Intelligence Survey + Architecting Multi-Agent + Long-Horizon Planning cover multi-agent forecast council.' total_hits = 8 >> 1, kw_hits = 2, distinct_effect_clusters = 4 >> 1, candidate FAILS.
recommendation: REJECT candidate. KOGI-MAMA-COUNCIL is fully anticipated by the conjunction Council Mode 2604.02923 + Multi-Agent Debate Stability Vusd1Hw2D9 + LLM Council Karpathy + VirtusLab LLM Council + Council AI app + Democratic Voting-Based Council + Courtroom-Style Multi-Agent Debate 2603.28488 + Collective Intelligence Survey 202511.1370. Specifically: (1) the N=5 multi-agent elder council + weighted-consensus aggregation IS Council Mode 2604.02923 + Karpathy LLM Council + VirtusLab + Council AI app verbatim; (2) the per-hazard specialist elders IS the Democratic Voting-Based Council Medium's specialist-role-separation + Courtroom-Style 2603.28488's role-switching paradigm; (3) the weighted-consensus aggregation via calibration-derived weights IS the weighted-voting protocol Democratic Voting-Based Council and Collective Intelligence Survey 202511.1370 catalog; (4) the flag-veto override on critical-hazard p_critical > τ_warn is a thin threshold-fallback variant of the consensus-model arbitration Council Mode 2604.02923 deploys and the safety-aware aggregation Collective Intelligence Survey 202511.1370 documents; (5) the Aluna-style contemplative multi-pass deliberation (each elder reads peers' outputs and revises) IS Multi-Agent Debate Stability Vusd1Hw2D9's iterative-refinement-with-peer-reading + Courtroom-Style Debate 2603.28488's progressive multi-round protocol verbatim. The candidate's own novelty claim explicitly concedes that LLM Council + Collective Intelligence Survey cover the multi-agent forecast council baseline. To salvage, the candidate would need a feature uniquely supplied by the Kogi-Mama source not anticipated by these clusters, e.g.: (a) a '18-year-darkness training' operationalized as a long-horizon curriculum-learning protocol with empirically demonstrated forecast-horizon improvement beyond off-the-shelf fine-tuning — beyond Council Mode's heterogeneous-LLM training-agnostic framing; (b) a cross-tribe-council operationalized as inter-organizational federated-council with privacy-preserving cross-domain aggregation (each tribe = a separate institution publishing only forecasts) — beyond Council AI's single-platform multi-model deployment; (c) an Aluna-life-force operationalized as a globally-shared latent-state vector each elder reads and writes during deliberation with a provable mutual-information-preservation property — beyond multi-agent-debate's plain peer-message-passing; (d) a flag-veto with formal false-warning rate / missed-warning rate operating-characteristic curve over long-horizon hazard distributions and demonstrated calibration superiority over single-threshold-on-aggregate — beyond the safety-threshold variants Collective Intelligence Survey already documents. As stated, KOGI-MAMA-COUNCIL is in the saturated region documented by Council Mode 2604.02923 + Multi-Agent Debate Stability Vusd1Hw2D9 + LLM Council Karpathy + VirtusLab + Council AI + Democratic Voting-Based Council + Courtroom-Style Multi-Agent Debate 2603.28488 + Collective Intelligence Survey 202511.1370, with each of the three claimed contributions anticipated by at least two prior-art clusters.
